arts.ttl: (WATCH) Robert Lewandowski’s opener cancelled out at Sevilla
arts.sum: Barcelona have been pulled back to 1-1 in their La Liga clash away at rivals Sevilla. Hansi Flick is aiming to close the title gap on Atletico Madrid and Real Madrid with a win in Andalucia. arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer Frenkie de Jong transfer blow as Barcelona perform 'complete U-turn'
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong could reportedly perform a U-turn on his future and sign a new contract with the Blaugrana amid links with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s squad players are making a push to become starters
arts.sum: Ferran Torres hit a hat-trick against Valencia in the Copa del Rey, and Fermín López added another, as Frenkie de Jong and Eric Garcia pulled the strings from deep. Some of FC Barcelona ’s squad players are contributing more than ever, as they fight for more minutes and even potentially a starting place.
